title: 申请加入请在这里评论 （也可以直接发 Pull Request）
summary:
### 入选标准
* 网站 / App
* 如果是 Github 库， README 或顶部描述里，要附上网站或 App Store 地址，不能是纯粹针对开发者的工具，如果包含了针对开发者的工具，那就太多了。所以只允许针对普通用户的网站/App 列在表里

### 不收录的东西
* 开发者工具（Github 本质上就是个开发者工具大集合，收录开发者工具这个表会爆炸的）
* 社区类网站（v2ex，ruby-china，各种 php 社区，太多太多太多了。没法收。希望理解）

### 流程
看了评论后会做决定，
如果入了，会加进去。
如果没入，会告知你理由（希望你不要介意 :

title: [PR] fix(api): enforce API_TIMEOUT_MS for OpenAI-compatible headers
summary:
## Summary
- Bound OpenAI-compatible requests that stall before response headers arrive.
- Keep long-running streaming bodies unaffected after headers are received.

## Implementation
- Parse `API_TIMEOUT_MS` once per request with a 600000 ms default and safe integer validation.
- Arm a per-attempt

title: [PR] feat(testing): Integration Test TestType — headless integration suites, host-based CI gate + RunView cache fixes
summary:
## Summary

Introduces the **"Integration Test" `TestType`** — a headless, metadata-driven integration tier that exercises the **real** MJ provider stack (live SQL Server + GraphQL, real cache managers/engines, real entity saves — no browser, no mocks) and lives inside the Testing Framework. It sits

title: [PR] Checkfixes
summary:
Trying to reduce the amount of noisy checks.

Adds several new auto-fix scripts (mostly written by claude). The fix scripts should be run with supervision and not incorporated into any sort of automated pipeline.
